items.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.8 (Fast Mode)
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This issue has been resolved. Claude Opus 4.8 (Fast Mode) saw elevated errors from 7:50 PM PT / 02:50 UTC to 8:30 PM PT / 03:30 UTC.
